query_title: Teen Titans Go! To the Movies

recommendations.title: Justice League vs. Teen Titans
recommendations.overview: Robin is sent by Batman to work with the Teen Titans after his volatile behavior botches up a Justice League mission. The Titans must then step up to face Trigon after he possesses the League and threatens to conquer the world.

recommendations.title: Teen Titans Go! & DC Super Hero Girls: Mayhem in the Multiverse
recommendations.overview: With the help of an ancient Kryptonian power, Lex Luthor unites the world’s Super-Villains to capture all of Earth's Super Heroes, until…only the DC Super Hero Girls are left to stop the Legion of Doom. Our heroes must cross dimensions to rescue thei

recommendations.title: Teen Titans Go! See Space Jam
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: The Teen Titans are visited by the Nerdlucks, the Space Jam villains who tried to capture Michael Jordan and the Looney Tunes. Astonished to discover his fellow Titans have never seen Space Jam, Cyborg organizes an exclusive watch party.

recommendations.title: Justice League Dark: Apokolips War
recommendations.overview: Earth is decimated after intergalactic tyrant Darkseid has devastated the Justice League in a poorly executed war by the DC Super Heroes. Now the remaining bastions of good – the Justice League, Teen Titans, Suicide Squad and assorted others – must r

recommendations.title: Teen Titans: Trouble in Tokyo
recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: After a battle with a high-tech villain named, Saiko-Tek, the Teen Titans travel to the city of Tokyo where they find themselves embroiled in a conflict with an ancient enemy.
recommendations.director: Matt Youngberg, Michael Chang, Heather A. Maxwell

recommendations.title: Teen Titans: The Judas Contract
recommendations.overview: Tara Markov is a girl who has power over earth and stone; she is also more than she seems. Is the newest Teen Titan an ally or a threat? And what are the mercenary Deathstroke's plans for the Titans?

recommendations.title: Trollhunters: Rise of the Titans
recommendations.overview: The Guardians of Arcadia reunite to battle the nefarious Arcane Order, who've reawakened the primordial Titans.
recommendations.director: Johane Matte, Andrew L. Schmidt, Francisco Ruiz Velasco

recommendations.title: Mad God
recommendations.overview: A figure known as "The Assassin" descends from the heavens into a nightmarish pit full of monsters, titans, and cruelty.

recommendations.title: LEGO DC Batman: Family Matters
recommendations.overview: Suspicion is on high after Batman, Batgirl, Robin and other DC superheroes receive mysterious invitations. However, family values must remain strong when Batman and his team encounter the villainous Red Hood, who is obsessed with destroying the Bat-f

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.
